trans-unit.id: Please fill the fields below to complete your purchase.
trans-unit.source: Please fill the fields below to complete your purchase.
trans-unit.target: Preencha os campos abaixo para concluir a sua compra.

trans-unit.id: You have chosen to pay via %s.
trans-unit.source: You have chosen to pay via %s.

trans-unit.id: The total for your order will be %s.
trans-unit.source: The total for your order will be %s.
trans-unit.target: O total do seu pedido será %s.

trans-unit.id: To confirm your order, fill the following information:
trans-unit.source: To confirm your order, fill the following information:
trans-unit.target: Para confirmar seu pedido, preencha as informações a seguir:

trans-unit.id: This payment method is not available.
trans-unit.source: This payment method is not available.
trans-unit.target: Este método de pagamento não está disponível.

trans-unit.id: agpaymentmodes - Error in the cart %d - additional information is empty.
trans-unit.source: agpaymentmodes - Error in the cart %d - additional information is empty.
trans-unit.target: agpaymentmodes - Erro no carrinho %d - informação adicional vazia.

trans-unit.id: Complete the payment for your order
trans-unit.source: Complete the payment for your order
trans-unit.target: Conclua o pagamento do seu pedido

trans-unit.id: agpaymentmodes - Error in the cart %d - payment mode %s not found or disabled.
trans-unit.source: agpaymentmodes - Error in the cart %d - payment mode %s not found or disabled.
trans-unit.target: agpaymentmodes - Erro no carrinho %d - forma de pagamento %s não encontrada ou desativada.
